name: sub-agent-finding
description: When a sub-agent reports back via the scratchpad, the boss's later compaction must preserve which sub_id produced which finding. Losing the sub_id breaks attribution for any follow-up promote() / read_scratch() the boss might issue post-compaction.

prior.content: Investigate who on the team is over-committed this week and surface the worst case.
I'll spawn a focused sub-agent to scan the calendar load for each direct report.
Reading sub_a's findings from the scratchpad.

value.text: Bob has 27 calendar hours booked Mon-Fri — most overcommitted on the team. Alice second at 22h.

prior.content: Sub_a found Bob is the most overcommitted at 27h booked this week.

inFlightTail.content: Now drafting a short note flagging Bob's load to the user.
